difficulty.reason: Germinates in days, harvestable in 25 days, nearly impossible to kill

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Tiny green shoots poking through the soil within 3-5 days

prompt.en: Look closely at the soil -- can you see tiny green dots pushing up?
prompt.da: Kig taet paa jorden -- kan du se smaa groenne prikker, der skyder op?

growth_stages.name: Leaf Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Two round seed leaves, then rough true leaves appear

prompt.en: How many leaves does each radish have now? Count them!
prompt.da: Hvor mange blade har hver radise nu? Tael dem!

growth_stages.name: Root Swelling
growth_stages.look_for: Pink/red tops visible above the soil line

prompt.en: Gently brush the soil -- see the pink top? It's nearly ready!
prompt.da: Boerst forsigtigt jorden vaek -- ser du den lyserode top? Den er naesten klar!

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Radish top about 2-3cm across, visible above soil

prompt.en: Grab the green top and PULL! Rinse it, taste it -- is it spicy or mild?
prompt.da: Tag fat i det groenne top og TRAEK! Skyl den, smag -- er den staerk eller mild?

human_readable.en: Water lightly every day or two. Don't let soil dry out completely.
human_readable.da: Vand let hver dag eller hver anden dag. Lad ikke jorden toerre helt ud.

harvest.notes: Succession sow every 2 weeks from W18 for continuous harvest through summer. Pull before they go woody.

companion_plants.notes: Quick crop that fits between slower plants. Good gap-filler.

message.en: Radishes need water -- they'll go woody if the soil dries out!
message.da: Radiserne har brug for vand -- de bliver traede, hvis jorden toerrer ud!
